name: consumption trace: when every recorded standards_state across the commit window is fresh-within-fetch-frequency, /audit-pack emits a "Standards: all-fresh" badge
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance && printf '{"commit":"abc","standards_state":{"google-tsguide":{"freshness_at_generation":"fresh-within-fetch-frequency"}}}' > .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack.sh" --emit "$PWD/audit-pack.md" --section badges && grep -E "Standards: all-fresh" audit-pack.md 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
